query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| timeslice 5m
| count by _timeslice,  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| where country_name="United States" AND !isNull(region) AND region !=""
| count by _timeslice, region
| transpose row _timeslice column region as *

sources.dashboardDescription: The Nginx - Visitor Locations Dashboard provides a high-level view of Nginx visitor geographic locations both worldwide and in the United States. Dashboard panels also show graphic trends for visits by country over time and visits by  US region over time.
sources.panelTitle: Visits by US Regions Over Time
